name: church-website-qanafar
description: Evangelical Baptist Church of Khirbet Qanafar Full-Stack Website

scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build-client: npm run build --prefix client && xcopy /E /I /Y client\dist server\public
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
